title: Code and source data for baseline contact-detection scaling in fluid-coupled drone-swarm proxy simulations
description: Code, source data, validation scripts, configuration files, selected figure sources, manuscript-support files, and compact sensitivity outputs supporting the manuscript 'Baseline contact-detection scaling in fluid-coupled periodic models of self-propelled drone-swarm proxies'. The software is released under the MIT License and the source data are released under CC BY 4.0 unless otherwise noted.
notes: The root-level DATA_LICENSE.txt file specifies the CC BY 4.0 license for source-data files. The Zenodo DOI minted from this release should be inserted into the manuscript Data Availability and Code Availability statements before journal submission.
